title: 'I Did It All on My Own Without Any Sugar Daddy': Sonal Mansingh on Her Centre for Indian Classical Dances’ Golden Jubilee Year
description: Founded in 1977 by Dr Sonal Mansingh, a dance legend, the the Centre for Indian Classical Dances has long stood at the intersection of rigorous training and philosophical inquiry. The Golden Jubilee event, held in Delhi, reflected both the weight of its legacy and the urgency of its future mission.
